subject: Your Collectible Trump-Pence Presidential button

body:
Get your Official Trump Pence Presidential buttons now. |
[](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecjba12oQE0EwCFhWgaBFOyDRMN6aaaaCK2pBMDWE0ea?l=-@uFuDr&n=UynrcuZ1xE_XvRrc.lfv&c=r&o=&0=s-tEsD12i3dy1yVwTn1kl2kxe11maHaoTHkHkHYo1n1-&kHk)

Friend,

This Thanksgiving, we're thankful for you and our millions of patriotic supporters across the country.

Your support helped us take back the White House and win states that hadn't voted Republican in 30 years.

To commemorate our historic victory, we're unveiling the Trump-Pence Presidential Collectible Buttons so that you can remember the role you played in winning back the White House.

[**Show you helped make history and be one of the first to get the Official Trump-Pence Presidential Collectible Buttons for $5 today.**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecjba12oQE0EwCFhWgaBFOyDRMN6aaaaCK2pBMDWE0ea?l=-@uFuDr&n=UynrcuZ1xE_XvRrc.lfv&c=o&o=&0=s-tEsD12i3dy1yVwTn1kl2kxe11maHaoTHkHkHYo1n1-&kHk)
[](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecjba12oQE0EwCFhWgaBFOyDRMN6aaaaCK2pBMDWE0ea?l=-@uFuDr&n=UynrcuZ1xE_XvRrc.lfv&c=s&o=&0=s-tEsD12i3dy1yVwTn1kl2kxe11maHaoTHkHkHYo1n1-&kHk)
So many of our supporters still hold on to their now-vintage Reagan, Goldwater, and Eisenhower campaign buttons.

They can look back and remember the support they pledged at critical moments in our nation's history.

And with your Trump-Pence buttons, you'll also be able to look back and remember the role you played in this truly historic election.

[**Get your Official Trump-Pence Presidential Collectible Buttons today.**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecjba12oQE0EwCFhWgaBFOyDRMN6aaaaCK2pBMDWE0ea?l=-@uFuDr&n=UynrcuZ1xE_XvRrc.lfv&c=p&o=&0=s-tEsD12i3dy1yVwTn1kl2kxe11maHaoTHkHkHYo1n1-&kHk)

Thanks,

[](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecjba12oQE0EwCFhWgaBFOyDRMN6aaaaCK2pBMDWE0ea?l=-@uFuDr&n=UynrcuZ1xE_XvRrc.lfv&c=s&o=&0=s-tEsD12i3dy1yVwTn1kl2kxe11maHaoTHkHkHYo1n1-&kHk)

Alex
Trump Store Manager

****[GET YOURS](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecjba12oQE0EwCFhWgaBFOyDRMN6aaaaCK2pBMDWE0ea?l=-@uFuDr&n=UynrcuZ1xE_XvRrc.lfv&c=q&o=&0=s-tEsD12i3dy1yVwTn1kl2kxe11maHaoTHkHkHYo1n1-&kHk)****

name: Americans For Prosperity
subject: Keep the Lame Duck's appetite in check
body:
| | [Web Version](http://view.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=578fa815d43bfb2a78be63c554894c3cc4beb7e96b4cb2fbe0fd18f4f5933e54e5b6a75b42be8c579f19aa169e32663809f813b577943215ee6293f61d4262fed1ea65e06a862f53)
---
| |
---
| | | | |
---
| |
---
| | Hi Peter-

As Americans across the country are still recovering from their Thanksgiving feasts, our Lame Duck Congress is preparing to fill its never-ending appetite for overspending.

This Lame Duck Congress, full of lawmakers who will soon be retiring or leaving their posts after losing reelection, lacks the accountability to the people that's inherent in a normal session of Congress.

It's not the time to commit to a giant, long-term spending bill, but that's exactly what many lawmakers will try to do.

Instead, lawmakers should focus on passing a clean spending bill that extends to early 2017, when we will have a Congress that is fully accountable and capable of fulfilling the will of the people.

We need to [pressure our lawmakers](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=fd4f868615c404b9da1a84e7a6d5543e71e40ea6bde13f3f760bf7dd33f8e8bd562f7fcc128df253 "pressure our lawmakers") to not use this Lame Duck session as an opportunity for more overspending and corporate welfare giveaways at the expense of the taxpayer.

****[](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=fd4f868615c404b91f81568e4aeedb174d6873241a99306fca142f3abf0935f38a0e60777a94722a)****

By clicking above, you can tell your members of Congress to do the right thing.

-Americans for Prosperity

****

****
---

This email was sent to: **dpwillis67@gmail.com **
We respect your right to privacy - [view our policy](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=fd4f868615c404b9f75349ead8e87776e97f2c79e5e4d6c015756645ca1ff42c937f2731baca2121) Americans For Prosperity Foundation 1310 N. Courthouse Road, Suite 700 Arlington, VA 22201 ******[Update Profile and Subscription Preferences](http://pages.myprosperitymail.com/page.aspx?QS=330c7

003i00000262AbVAAU) | [One-Click Unsubscribe](http://pages.myprosperitymail.com/page.aspx?QS=330c7

It's not the time to commit to a giant, long-term spending bill, but that's exactly what many lawmakers will try to do.
